verified.description: true ONLY if exploitation was executed against a concrete oracle. Otherwise false.

oracle.description: What concretely proved it (required when verified=true).

evidence.description: Reproducible proof: request(s)+response field(s) or ordered steps (required when verified=true).

report_path.description: Filename of the /report-yeswehack markdown written in the workspace (when verified=true).

why_unproven.description: When verified=false: exactly what's missing (needs creds, needs browser, WAF blocked, not reproducible, endpoint doesn't exist, etc.).
